subcodes.first_line: O thou kind friend! However tumultuous the ocean of the contingent world may be, it is but a single drop compared to the realm of the infinite [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یار موافقا عالم امکان هر نه قدر دنکیز شورانگیز ایسه جهان لامکاندن بر قطره
subcodes.subjects: @realms of being; three realms; five realms
